compiled_state.title: Add P0 bug display to sprint-list-epics.sh above epic list
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Modify sprint-list-epics.sh to query for open P0 bugs and display them prominently before the epic list.

## Implementation
- File: plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh (safeguard file — modify)
- Query open bugs with priority 0 using the Python ticket reducer section
- Display P0 bugs above the epic list in a prominent section:
  P0 bugs requiring attention:
    - [<id>] <title> (P0)
- Only show section if P0 bugs exist
- Format: ticket ID, title, priority

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] sprint-list-epics.sh shows P0 bugs when they exist
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh
- [ ] P0 bug section appears above epic list in output
  Verify: manual review (test covers behavioral assertion)
- [ ] No P0 section when no P0 bugs exist
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh (modify — safeguard file)
- tests/scripts/test-sprint-list-epics.sh (modify — add P0 bug display tests)

comments.body: Fixed: P0 bug display added to sprint-list-epics.sh with 2 new tests
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
